heading: Standard of regulation for motor vehicle rentals
label: 6781 Standard of regulation for motor vehicle rentals

children.heading: Protection against retroactive application of regulatory and legal action
children.label: a Protection against retroactive application of regulatory and legal action
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), during the 3-year period beginning on , it shall be a presumption that no State law imposes any licensing, appointment, or education requirements on any person who solicits the purchase of or sells insurance connected with, and incidental to, the lease or rental of a motor vehicle.November 12, 1999

children.heading: Preeminence of State insurance law
children.label: b Preeminence of State insurance law

children.text: the prospective application of any court judgment interpreting or applying any State statute; or
the prospective application of any final State regulation, order, bulletin, or other statutorily authorized interpretation or action,
the lease or rental of a motor vehicle for a total period of 90 consecutive days or less; and
insurance which is provided in connection with, and incidentally to, such lease or rental for a period of consecutive days not exceeding the lease or rental period.

children.heading: Motor vehicle defined
children.label: d Motor vehicle defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “motor vehicle” has the same meaning as in .section 13102 of title 49
